sample_reviews.author: James H
sample_reviews.text: Brilliant service from start to finish. Boiler packed in on a cold morning and LS Plumbing had someone out to us within a couple of hours. Would highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Very professional and tidy. They fitted a new bathroom for us and the quality of the work was excellent. Fair pricing and great communication throughout.

sample_reviews.author: David T
sample_reviews.text: Used LS Plumbing for a boiler service and a leaking radiator repair. Turned up on time, got the job done quickly and left everything clean. Good value.

brand.usp: LS Plumbing & Heating Limited delivers reliable, high-quality plumbing and heating solutions across Leeds with prompt response times and transparent pricing. Whether it's a boiler breakdown or a full bathroom fit, we get the job done right first time.
brand.hero_headline: Expert Plumbing & Heating Solutions Across Leeds
brand.about_paragraph: Here at LS Plumbing & Heating Limited, we're passionate about providing Leeds homeowners with a plumbing and heating service they can truly rely on. We're fully Gas Safe registered and bring years of hands-on experience to every job, from boiler installations to emergency call-outs. Our goal is simple — to treat every home like our own and leave every customer completely satisfied.
